basic_details.job_title: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Sr. Project Scientist and Project Associate I Posts
basic_details.organization_name: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB)
basic_details.short_information: International Centre for Genetic Engineering and Biotechnology (ICGEB) Sr. Project Scientist Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.icgeb.org/. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICGEB Recruitment 2026, including 2 Sr. Project Scientist and 1 Project Associate I posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science or related quantitative field, M.Tech with 6 years experience, Master's degree in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science or related quantitative field
qualification.details: Sr. Project Scientist: Ph.D. in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science, or a closely related quantitative field. First class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate discipline, or M. Tech. with first class or equivalent and six years of relevant experience. Proven experience with AI for the classification of biological datasets. Experience in Designing, training, and validating AI/ML architectures (including Deep Learning, GNNs, or Transformers) tailored for biological sequences, structural biology, or clinical datasets, including image data sets. Experience in maintaining rigorous code repositories (GitHub/GitLab), writing technical documentation, and contributing to peer-reviewed scientific publications. OR Proven experience in one or more omics data analysis areas, including single-cell and bulk RNA-seq, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq, spatial omics, proteomics, metabolomics, genomics, imaging data, or clinical data. Strong proficiency in Python and R/MATLAB. Hands-on experience in applying machine learning and deep learning techniques to biological data. Expertise in biological data mining, preprocessing, and preparation for downstream analyses. Project Associate I: Master's degree in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science, or a closely related quantitative field, and experience working on bioinformatics or computational biology projects.

salary_details.pay_scale: ₹77,152/- per month (inclusive of HRA) for Sr. Project Scientist, ₹31,750/- per month (inclusive of HRA) for Project Associate I
salary_details.details: Sr. Project Scientist: ₹77,152/- per month (inclusive of HRA) Project Associate I: ₹31,750/- per month (inclusive of HRA)

selection_process: Online Application Submission Shortlisting In-person Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICGEB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICGEB Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Sr. Project Scientist: Ph.D. in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science, or a closely related quantitative field. First class or equivalent at the preceding degree in the appropriate discipline, or M. Tech. with first class or equivalent and six years of relevant experience. Proven experience with AI for the classification of biological datasets. Experience in Designing, training, and validating AI/ML architectures (including Deep Learning, GNNs, or Transformers) tailored for biological sequences, structural biology, or clinical datasets, including image data sets. Experience in maintaining rigorous code repositories (GitHub/GitLab), writing technical documentation, and contributing to peer-reviewed scientific publications. OR Proven experience in one or more omics data analysis areas, including single-cell and bulk RNA-seq, ATAC-seq, ChIP-seq, spatial omics, proteomics, metabolomics, genomics, imaging data, or clinical data. Strong proficiency in Python and R/MATLAB. Hands-on experience in applying machine learning and deep learning techniques to biological data. Expertise in biological data mining, preprocessing, and preparation for downstream analyses. Project Associate I: Master's degree in Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, Health Informatics, Data Science, or a closely related quantitative field, and experience working on bioinformatics or computational biology projects.

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Sr. Project Scientist: ₹77,152/- per month (inclusive of HRA) Project Associate I: ₹31,750/- per month (inclusive of HRA)

content_sections.heading: ICGEB Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Online Application Submission Shortlisting In-person Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ICGEB to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026 is July 31, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Sr. Project Scientist posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026. This includes positions for Sr. Project Scientist and Project Associate I.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Sr. Project Scientist?
faq.answer: For the Sr. Project Scientist position, candidates need a Ph.D. in relevant quantitative fields like Bioinformatics, Computational Biology, Computer Science, or M.Tech with 6 years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for ICGEB Recruitment 2026 involves Online Application Submission, followed by Shortlisting of candidates, and finally an In-person Interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sr. Project Scientist position will receive a salary of ₹77,152/- per month, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q7. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions applications are invited from eligible candidates in Delhi. However, it's advisable to check the official notification for any specific location-based restrictions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions advertised under ICGEB Recruitment 2026 are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section on this page. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. How should I apply for the ICGEB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official website or the provided "Apply Online" link on or before the last date, July 31, 2026.
